game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
An accidental fire at a funeral forces the police to re-investigate a closed case of massacre. Lin Lixun participates the re-investigation by chances. As the investigation goes deeper, the past of the victims gradually emerges. However, the case becomes more bewildering.

Follow us

Want to know how the game is progressing? Follow us here:

  • Weibo


Upcoming game you may love


About the Game

Firework is a Chinese horror puzzle game. The story takes place in a remote mountain village. An accidental fire at a funeral forces the police to re-investigate a closed case of the massacre. Lin Lixun, rookie police, participates in the re-investigation by chance. As the investigation goes deeper, the past of the victims gradually emerges. However, the case becomes more bewildering. Is it a supernatural phenomenon, or an elaborated murder?

Feature




  • Firework is an oriental horror puzzle game. The story takes place in a remote mountain village. An accidental fire at a funeral forces the police to re-investigate a closed case of the massacre. Lin Lixun, rookie police, participates in the re-investigation by chance. As the investigation goes deeper, the past of the victims gradually emerges. However, the case becomes more bewildering.
  • You can experience the oriental environment of a Chinese village, and also feel the chill to the bone.
  • There are many Easter eggs from a certain period time of in China which is an important part of memory for our generation.



  • The nostalgic watercolor style along with the bleak and strange atmosphere will recall the time in your childhood when you were watching a horror movie at night for the first time.
  • This game pursues the veiled representation of oriental horror. There are no jump scares, no place to hide under and you can barely see any ghosts in this game, but you can feel the horror swirling around.




  • This is a thrilling and unknown exploration. You will follow the steps of the protagonist to uncover the truth under the tragedy.
  • This is also a story with oriental mysticism and realism. It is grotesque, but it may happen somewhere in this world.
  • The delicate narrative makes the suspense layers stack up. You might think you know the truth, but suddenly the mist will blur everything again.




  • Everyone plays a small role in the changing world, however, everyone is the hero of their own story.
  • Every character in the game is important. You will get to know them, understand them, and share their joys and sorrows.




  • The puzzle design is in a sweet spot, it won't be too difficult, but it's also challenging.
  • The game combines puzzles and stories together in a very effective way to make the story even more interesting.
game_info.description: You are Lin Lixun, a rookie police officer investigating a mysterious massacre case in a remote mountain village. Navigate through dark corridors, collect evidence scattered throughout the village, and solve the case by finding all clues. But beware - supernatural forces lurk in the shadows, and time is running out. Collect all 8 pieces of evidence while avoiding the wandering spirits to uncover the truth behind the tragedy.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move Lin Lixun in four directions
Space: Interact with evidence/clues when nearby
Shift: Sprint (move faster, but drains stamina)
Z: Use flashlight to reveal hidden paths (limited battery)
Enter: Start game from menu
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to start screen

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic movement mechanics and collision detection. Validates that the player can move in all four directions, collides properly with walls, and position updates correctly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move the player systematically in all four directions, testing wall collisions and boundary detection. Verify movement speed and collision response work as expected.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player moves smoothly without passing through walls, responds to all directional inputs, and position is properly tracked. Test is successful when all movement mechanics are validated without errors.

TEST_1.expected: Player moves smoothly without passing through walls, responds to all directional inputs, and position is properly tracked. Test is successful when all movement mechanics are validated without errors.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing the win condition by collecting all evidence pieces while avoiding spirits. This validates the core gameplay loop and ensures the game can be completed.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Use pathfinding to navigate efficiently to each evidence location, collect all 8 pieces while monitoring spirit positions and avoiding them. Use sprint and flashlight strategically to reach evidence quickly.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully collect all 8 evidence pieces without being caught by spirits. Game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN state with victory message. Test is successful when win condition is achieved.

TEST_3.test_description: Testing stamina and resource management systems. Validates that sprinting depletes stamina, flashlight drains battery, and both regenerate properly when not in use.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Alternate between sprinting and walking to test stamina depletion and regeneration. Toggle flashlight on and off to verify battery management. Monitor resource levels throughout.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Stamina and battery deplete when used and regenerate when idle. Player cannot sprint when stamina is depleted, and flashlight turns off when battery is empty. Systems work as designed.
TEST_3.description: Testing stamina and resource management systems. Validates that sprinting depletes stamina, flashlight drains battery, and both regenerate properly when not in use.

TEST_4.test_description: Testing spirit AI behavior and collision detection. Validates that spirits patrol properly, chase the player when detected, and trigger game over on contact.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Deliberately get close to spirits to trigger detection, then test if they chase effectively. Verify detection range and chase mechanics. Eventually allow spirit to catch player to test game over condition.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Spirits patrol their routes, detect player within range, chase when alerted, and trigger GAME_OVER_LOSE on contact. Test is successful when lose condition works correctly.

TEST_5.test_description: Testing evidence collection mechanics and interaction system. Validates that evidence can be collected when player is nearby and presses space, and progress is tracked correctly.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Navigate to evidence locations and test interaction range and key press response. Verify that evidence disappears after collection and counter increments properly.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Evidence can be collected only when player is in range and presses space. Collection updates score correctly and evidence is removed from game. All 8 pieces are collectible.
